title: Be able to set specific non working dates for a project (i.e. Christmas closedown)
excerpt: We use Monday.com for a roadmap with a timeline display - elements of that roadmap run over UK bank holidays including Christmas. I would like to be able to set these as specific non-working days for a project and then f…

posts.author: deborahf (Deborah Fern)
posts.cookedHtml: We use Monday.com for a roadmap with a timeline display - elements of that roadmap run over UK bank holidays including Christmas. I would like to be able to set these as specific non-working days for a project and then for any calculations to take account of that.

posts.author: Adrian (Adrian F. Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! We are a school district and would definitely want this for our general accounting department.

posts.author: CharlieFacade (Charlie Kickham)
posts.cookedHtml: 2 years and 2 months old and no answers to this? Surely there’s an answer to this?!

posts.author: Mark2 (Mark2)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this seems a basic feature that almost everyone would need?
